hero.title: Expert
hero.subtitle: Fast, reliable, and professional laptop repair services. We fix all brands with certified technicians and genuine parts.

servicesList.title: Our
servicesList.subtitle: Professional solutions for all your laptop problems

services.title: Screen Replacement
services.description: Cracked or broken screen? We replace all types of laptop screens with original quality panels.

services.title: Battery Replacement
services.description: Poor battery life? Get genuine replacement batteries with warranty for all laptop models.

services.title: Motherboard Repair
services.description: Complex motherboard issues including power problems, chip-level repairs, and circuit fixes.

services.title: Data Recovery
services.description: Lost important data? Professional data recovery services for hard drives and SSDs.

services.title: Keyboard Repair
services.description: Stuck keys, broken keyboard, or liquid damage? Complete keyboard replacement and cleaning.

services.title: Software Troubleshooting
services.description: OS installation, virus removal, performance optimization, and software configuration.

services.title: Overheating Solutions
services.description: Laptop overheating? Thermal paste replacement, fan cleaning, and cooling system servicing.

services.title: General Maintenance
services.description: Complete laptop servicing including cleaning, optimization, and health check-up.

processFlow.title: Our
processFlow.subtitle: Simple, transparent, and reliable service from start to finish

steps.title: Free Diagnosis
steps.description: Bring your laptop to us or request pickup. We'll diagnose the issue for free.

steps.title: Get Quote
steps.description: Receive a detailed quote with repair cost and timeline. No hidden charges.

steps.title: Approval & Repair
steps.description: Once approved, our experts begin the repair using genuine parts.

steps.title: Quality Check
steps.description: Every repair undergoes rigorous testing to ensure perfect functionality.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Collect your laptop or get it delivered. Enjoy your device with warranty!

cta.text: Need help? Our experts are just a call away!

testimonials.title: What Our
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by thousands of satisfied customers

reviews.name: Rajesh Verma
reviews.text: Excellent service! My laptop screen was replaced in just 2 hours. Great quality work and very reasonable pricing.

reviews.name: Meera Shah
reviews.text: Data recovery experts! They recovered all my important files from a dead hard drive. Highly recommend their services.

reviews.name: Arjun Reddy
reviews.text: Fast and professional service. Fixed my overheating issue and now my laptop works like new. Thank you!

reviews.name: Divya Krishnan
reviews.text: Best repair shop in town! They fixed my MacBook motherboard issue and it's been working perfectly for 6 months now.

reviews.name: Prakash Iyer
reviews.text: Very trustworthy service. They gave me a fair quote and completed the repair on time. Will definitely come back.

reviews.name: Kavita Menon
reviews.text: Excellent customer service! They explained the issue clearly and fixed my battery problem at a great price.
